client_audio_pipeline_flags_t(3) Library Functions Manual client_audio_pipeline_flags_t(3)

NAME

client_audio_pipeline_flags_t - Component enable/disable flags.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/audio/client_pipeline.h>

Data Fields


bool echo_cancel
bool noise_suppress
bool agc
bool vad
bool jitter_buffer
bool compressor
bool noise_gate
bool highpass
bool lowpass

Detailed Description

Component enable/disable flags.

Each flag controls whether a specific processing component is active. Disabling components can help with debugging or reduce CPU usage.

Definition at line 109 of file client_pipeline.h.

Field Documentation

bool client_audio_pipeline_flags_t::agc

Enable Speex automatic gain control
